steps.title: Substitute x = 41 into the model
steps.content: The colony has 41 worker ants, and $20 \leq 41 \leq 110$, so the equation applies: $$y = 0.67(41) + 2.6$$

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• A) 30 — matches 30.07, the predicted value.
  • B) 44 — would require $y \approx 44$, far above 30.07.
  • C) 57 — way too high; you'd get this from $x \approx 81$.
  • D) 134 — this is roughly $0.67 \cdot 41 + 2.6$ multiplied wrong; nowhere near 30.07.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
